title: Peppery Creamy Vermicelli Stir-Fry
description: A spicy and creamy vermicelli pasta dish with a touch of Ethiopian flavor, perfect for those days when you're feeling under the weather or need a quick, paleo-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup vermicelli pasta
ingredients.notes: Soak in warm water for at least 30 minutes to soften.

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon cayenne pepper
ingredients.notes: To add heat, adjust to taste.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add onion, garlic, and cayenne pepper; sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add spinach to the pan, cook until wilted. Season with salt if needed.
Drain soaked vermicelli pasta and add it into the pan along with any leftover soaking water. Toss well so that no vermicelli is stuck together.
For a creamy texture, you can stir in a spoonful of sour cream or coconut milk for every cup of pasta. Stir until everything is well combined and slightly thickened.
If using Parmesan cheese, sprinkle it over the top just before serving for an extra layer of flavor and texture.
